expectations.evidence: Founder-in-transition persona paired with voice-loss pain structures each angle

expectations.text: Names specific messaging angles (not just topics)

expectations.text: Names one distinct angle per awareness stage (5 total)

expectations.text: Angles escalate in specificity from unaware to most-aware
